task_completion.visual_evidence: The volume 'project_active.hc' is visible in the 'Favorite Volumes' organizer dialog or is seen being added via the 'Add to Favorites' dialog.
The volume 'reference_docs.hc' is visible in the 'Favorite Volumes' organizer dialog or is seen being added via the 'Add to Favorites' dialog.

task_completion.description: Add 'archive_cold.hc' to Favorite Volumes as Read-Only
task_completion.visual_evidence: The volume 'archive_cold.hc' is being added or edited in the favorites list, and the 'Mount volume as read-only' checkbox is explicitly checked.
The agent clicks 'Mount Favorite Volumes' from the 'Favorites' menu, or a password prompt specifically for mounting favorite volumes appears.

task_completion.description: Ensure all three volumes remain mounted simultaneously
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt main window shows 'project_active.hc', 'reference_docs.hc', and 'archive_cold.hc' all currently mounted in different drive slots at the same time.

integrity.description: The agent used the VeraCrypt GUI to configure favorites
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the VeraCrypt graphical interface to add favorites, rather than opening and editing Configuration.xml in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine VeraCrypt application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard VeraCrypt application windows and dialogs are used, not a terminal or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing bash scripts or veracrypt command-line arguments being used to mount the volumes or modify settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected volumes are 'project_active.hc', 'reference_docs.hc', and 'archive_cold.hc' located in /home/ga/Volumes/. 'archive_cold.hc' must be configured as Read-Only, while the other two are Read-Write. The agent must use the 'Mount Favorite Volumes' feature to mount them simultaneously.
